summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. Missing essential files: New-BuildMatrix.Tests.ps1 (Pester tests), fixtures/basic.json, fixtures/full-featured.json, fixtures/oversized.json. Workflow will fail at line 17 (Invoke-Pester on missing test file). Code quality of present files is solid (good error handling, clear structure, proper pwsh usage), but incomplete solution cannot ship. Test harness assertions are brittle (string-matching output format). PowerShell CLI arg parsing (lines 113-120) is hacky. If these critical files existed and tests passed, overall would be ~4/5.
